title: April Fools Demo Screen
description: Send a demo screen packet to clients on April fools day.
body:
**April Fools' Demo Screen**

A server-side mod that displays the vanilla "Demo Mode" popup to players who log in on April 1st.

![Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03b345c4c1e5317089ab5cfc54b6534c0dd8f62d_0.webp)
